title: Tools
scope: A browser for the tool-routing registry: the categories, the tools each category exposes, and the long-form prompt-guide markdown beside them. An operator/developer surface for understanding what the chat agent can do and how it's routed. NOT the tool router itself — Tools is the read-only window onto it.

specs.title: Browse the tool registry
specs.behavior: The browser shows the tool-routing registry — categories, the tools each category exposes, and the long-form guide markdown for each.
